name: Chile crab and avocado salad
intro: Fresh white crabmeat is a treat: here, it is pepped up with chiles and herbs and served with dressed salad leaves. Your fishmonger can shell the crab for you, but it will always be freshest if you prepare it yourself.

ingredients.item: ripe avocados, peeled, pitted, and diced
red chile, seeded and finely chopped
salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Put the crabmeat and avocados in a medium bowl along with the herbs and the chile, stir well, and season with salt and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together all the dressing ingredients. Taste the dressing and season, if necessary.
Lay the salad leaves on a serving plate or 4 individual plates and top with the crabmeat mixture. Drizzle with the dressing and serve with the lemon wedges.
